description: Structured input contamination — camelCase tokens, schema field names, and telemetry strings that contain domain keywords must not trigger domain routing. Defect cases encode DESIRED behavior.

cases.note: \brole\b — 'userRole' is camelCase. Boundary prevents match. Current: GENERAL. Correct.
\bhire\b — 'hireDate' camelCase. Boundary prevents match. Current: GENERAL. Correct.
\bauto\b and \blease\b — both appear in camelCase. Boundaries prevent match. Current: GENERAL. Correct.
fundraise (not fundraising) — protected domain gate in ingress.js only matches 'fundraising', not 'fundraise'. Current: GENERAL. Correct.

jobOfferPackage: 'offer' appears as standalone word in space-separated token after camelCase prefix. \boffer\b fires on 'deserialization' context. Currently routes → CAREER. Structured telemetry should not trigger domain routing.
retirementSavingsModel: /retire/ pattern has no boundary — matches 'retirement' in camelCase prefix. Currently routes → RETIREMENT. Structured telemetry should not trigger domain routing.
